title: Model AI Governance Framework for Agentic AI

publisher.name: Infocomm Media Development Authority / AI Verify Foundation

appliesTo: Organisations deploying agentic AI whether in-house or via third-party agentic solutions
AI agents built on SLM/LLM/MLLM language models

sections.title: Core components of an agent
sections.summary: Model, instructions, planning and reasoning, tools, memory.

sections.title: How agent design affects the limits and capabilities of each agent
Model AI Governance Framework for Agentic AI
Assess and bound the risks upfront
sections.summary: Pillar 1: understand risks, bound capabilities by design.

sections.title: Determine suitable use cases for agent deployment
Bound risks through design by defining agents limits and permissions
Make humans meaningfully accountable
sections.summary: Pillar 2: clear responsibility allocation and meaningful oversight.

sections.title: Clear allocation of responsibilities within and outside the organisation
Implement technical controls and processes
sections.summary: Pillar 3: technical measures across the agent lifecycle.

sections.title: During design and development, use technical controls
When deploying, continuously monitor and test
Users who integrate agents into their work processes
